summary: Corrected the contents tool description to reference the real sibling tool names (trees_get/blobs_get) instead of nonexistent 'trees get'/'blobs get' CLI paths.
reason: The spec description propagated CLI argv syntax into the MCP tool list where those command paths do not exist; agents following it would call missing tools.
validated_outcome: Phase 4.9 docs audit finding closed; verify-skill green.
